description: Detects C# blocking calls on async code (.Result, .Wait(), .GetAwaiter().GetResult()) and async void methods. Simplified from Rust: flags all member_access_expression nodes. Cannot filter by member name (Result, Wait, GetResult), async context detection, or Main method exclusion. Higher false positive rate than Rust version.

flag.message: Member access detected -- if accessing .Result or .Wait() on a Task, use await instead to avoid blocking the calling thread.
